message:
🌱 Add cert-manager: Godaddy dns01 support mission (#1227)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "cert-manager-1083-godaddy-dns01-support",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "cert-manager: Godaddy dns01 support",
+    "description": "Godaddy dns01 support. Requested by 19+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current cert-manager deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your cert-manager version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cert-manager\nhelm list -n cert-manager 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working cert-manager installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review cert-manager configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant cert-manager configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n cert-manager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cert-manager\nkubectl get configmap -n cert-manager -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=cert-manager\n```\nSupport Godaddy as a DNS provider. Godaddy already exist in https://github.com/xenolf/lego/tree/master/providers/dns so it would be nice to have support for it in cert-manager."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Godaddy dns01 support",
+        "description": "Add Godaddy as a DNS01 provider\n\n*(optional, in `fixes #<issue number>(, fixes #<issue_number>, ...)` format, will close that issue when PR gets merged)*: fixes #\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cert-manager\nkubectl get events -n cert-manager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Godaddy dns01 support\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Add Godaddy as a DNS01 provider\n\n*(optional, in `fixes #<issue number>(, fixes #<issue_number>, ...)` format, will close that issue when PR gets merged)*: fixes #",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "cert-manager",
+      "graduated",
+      "security",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "cert-manager"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],

+      "feature"
+    ],

+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/cert-manager/cert-manager/issues/1083",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/cert-manager/cert-manager",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/cert-manager/cert-manager/pull/1084"
+    },
+    "reactions": 19,

+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",

+      "kubectl"
+    ],
